summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. Content fills horizontal space with max-w-7xl (1280px) container. Two-column layout preserved across desktop viewports with balanced grid proportions. Desktop header card visible at 1024x768 with status indicator and refresh button. Mobile view at 390x844 correctly shows compact accordion header instead of desktop header.
